description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind-CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow consists of multiple jobs for formatting, CPU, GPU, and linting tasks. The CPU job runs on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with various build types and configurations. The GPU jobs run on ubuntu-20.04 for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel architectures. Linting jobs run on macos-latest and ubuntu-latest for cppcheck, clang-tidy, and CodeQL analysis.
